title: NC State Basketball Tickets Available for 2026 ACC Tournament
summary: Tickets are now available for the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte, where NC State will compete.
charlotte_impact: The ACC Tournament brings significant revenue and tourism to Charlotte, boosting the local economy and fan engagement.

title: Stanley Martin Homes Opens New Community in Sherrills Ford, NC
summary: Stanley Martin Homes celebrates the grand opening of Essence at Laurelbrook, its first ESSENCE community in the Charlotte market.
charlotte_impact: New housing developments indicate growth in the Charlotte metro area, meeting housing demands and expanding residential options.

title: Trump Misstates Facts About NC Crime in State of the Union
summary: President Trump incorrectly stated the origin of a suspect in a Charlotte stabbing case during the State of the Union address.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the intersection of national politics and local crime, raising questions about immigration and public safety narratives.

title: Swimming Pool Filter Maker Hayward Has Major Plant in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a Charlotte-based company, is a major employer in Clemmons, NC, with over 1,000 workers.
charlotte_impact: Local manufacturing presence contributes to the regional economy, providing jobs and supporting local industries.

title: Trade Shows in Charlotte Leverage Custom Canopy Tents for Brand Visibility
summary: Exhibitors in Charlotte trade shows are using custom canopy tents to enhance brand visibility and ROI.
charlotte_impact: Trade shows are important for business development and marketing, boosting the local economy through events and tourism.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks Vice President of Business Development in Charlotte
summary: Mosaic Capital Partners, a Charlotte-based private equity firm, is seeking a Vice President of Business Development.
charlotte_impact: Growth in private equity indicates a healthy investment climate in Charlotte, fostering business expansion and job creation.

title: Florence Regional Airport Passengers Increased in 2025
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw an increase in passengers in 2025 but lost an American Airlines flight to Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Changes in air travel routes impact regional connectivity and economic development, affecting business and tourism.

title: Family Seeks Dropped Charges in Teacher's Death After Senior Prank
summary: Family of a Hall County teacher killed in a senior prank gone wrong wants charges dropped against the teenagers involved.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the tragic consequences of reckless behavior and raises questions about justice and forgiveness.

title: Pedestrian Dies Months After Being Struck by Alleged Drunk Driver
summary: A 75-year-old pedestrian died from injuries sustained after being hit by an allegedly impaired driver in December.
charlotte_impact: Drunk driving remains a serious public safety issue, with devastating consequences for victims and their families.

title: North Carolina Reaches $13B in Paid Sports Bets After Two Years
summary: North Carolina bettors wagered over $581 million in February, marking a 10% increase from February 2025.
charlotte_impact: Legalized sports betting generates significant revenue for the state, impacting the economy and funding public programs.

title: Partial Government Shutdown Could Cause Longer TSA Wait Times at Charlotte Airport
summary: Passengers at Charlotte airport are warned to expect longer TSA wait times due to a potential government shutdown.
charlotte_impact: Government shutdowns disrupt travel and commerce, affecting the economy and inconveniencing travelers.

title: The Origins of Women's History Month
summary: Women's History Month originated in the late 1970s with a school teacher named Molly Murphy Macgregor.
charlotte_impact: Recognizing the historical contributions of women promotes inclusivity and awareness of gender equality issues.

title: Missing Charlotte Teen Found Safe in Union County
summary: A missing Charlotte teen was found unharmed at a gas station in Fairview, Union County.
charlotte_impact: The safe recovery of a missing teen brings relief to the community and highlights the importance of search and rescue efforts.

title: Stellar Gospel Music Awards to be Hosted in Charlotte
summary: The Stellar Awards, established in 1985, will be hosted in Charlotte, reaching over 3.6 million viewers nationally.
charlotte_impact: Hosting major events like the Stellar Awards boosts Charlotte's cultural profile and attracts visitors.

title: Record Highs Possible Today and Tomorrow in Charlotte
summary: Charlotte is expecting record high temperatures today and tomorrow, followed by a return to average March weather.
charlotte_impact: Weather patterns affect daily life and agriculture, with extreme temperatures potentially impacting public health and infrastructure.
